overview: Fourthspace is a comprehensive all-in-one workspace platform for teams, featuring Notes, Projects, Chat, Calendar, Payroll, Escrow, Wallet (with real ICP/ICRC-1 ledger integration), AI, Integrations, Time Tracking, Goals/OKR, Whiteboards, and Public Forms — all scoped within isolated named workspaces.
features: Real ICP ledger integration for wallet and escrow
ICRC-1 token support (ckBTC, ckETH, and others)
Real principal ID and account ID derived from Internet Identity
Milestone-based on-chain escrow with real fund custody
Live dashboard with real workspace stats and activity
Notes with block editor, slash commands, and 16+ templates
Projects with kanban, sprints, milestones, and 12+ templates
Team chat with threads, reactions, and search
Calendar with recurring events and availability grid
Payroll with tax calculations and pay stubs
Goals/OKR with check-in history and public stakeholder view
Whiteboards with infinite canvas and sticky notes
Public Forms with conditional logic and analytics
Full light/dark mode with Linear-inspired design
Responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop
